diagrams.title: OS Position in Computer System
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture of a computer system with OS as intermediary
diagrams.purpose: Understand OS role as interface between hardware and user applications

diagrams.title: OS Functions Overview
diagrams.description: Five major functions of operating system and their interactions
elements: Process Management - CPU scheduling, process creation
Memory Management - RAM allocation, virtual memory
File Management - File operations, directory management
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how OS manages different computer resources systematically

diagrams.title: Boot Process Sequence
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow from power-on to operating system loaded
diagrams.purpose: Understand how computer starts up and loads operating system
